# ================= Core =================
torch==2.2.0
torchvision==0.17.0  # 必须与 torch 2.2.0 严格对应

# ================= OCR (固定官方兼容矩阵) =================
paddlepaddle==2.6.2
paddleocr==2.7.3

# ================= Vision & HF =================
transformers==4.38.2
accelerate==0.29.3   # 与 transformers 4.38.2 官方兼容
timm
einops

# ================= Detection & Vis =================
ultralytics==8.2.10  # 锁定兼容 torch 2.2.0 的版本
supervision

# ================= Image Processing =================
numpy==1.26.4     # <2.0.0 安全线
opencv-python-headless
pillow



# ================= Cloud & Engineering =================
dashscope
requests
python-dotenv
